exclusion_reason: Non-terminal sale-processing stage. The status at audit time was 'Birinci Alıcıya Süre Verildi' and the terminal 'Satıldı / Satış İşlemleri Tamamlandı' evidence was ABSENT. It therefore does NOT satisfy the completed-sale UYAP admission requirement (auditable appraisal value + auditable official auction/ihale price + TERMINAL completed-sale evidence). Recorded here only as an excluded audited candidate.

uyap_sale_prob is NOT created (public UYAP outcome taxonomy does not currently identify a comparable negative auction trade class)
the 6,700,000 TL result price shown at the sale-processing stage is NOT used as a completed auction price
batch_selection_rule: Browse UYAP e-Satış auction records in browsing order and take the first five records that satisfy the existing completed-sale UYAP admission requirements. A record must have auditable appraisal value, auditable official auction/ihale price, and terminal completed-sale evidence. Do not select observations based on the magnitude or direction of P/Q.

_note: Predeclared first-five-admissible completed-sale UYAP selection rule applied in browsing order. Five records satisfied the completed-sale admission requirements and were admitted to validation/structural/uyap.json as UYAP Evidence Expansion Batch 1. One encountered record (2026/316 Talimat) was at a non-terminal sale-processing stage and was excluded. This manifest mirrors the existing kap_candidates.json audit-manifest convention; it does NOT enter the genuine UYAP set, the SMM moments, or any negative-class construction. PRIVACY: only non-personal file/institution/economic/public-record fields are recorded — no party/debtor/creditor/representative/counsel names, phone/account/ID numbers.
